name: qdb-downloader
description: Create date-based football-data snapshots from supported online sources

scripts.start: bun run build:electron && concurrently --kill-others --names renderer,desktop "bun run start:renderer" "bun run start:desktop"
scripts.start:desktop: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:4200 .electron/electron/main.js .electron/electron/preload.js && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= QDB_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4200 electron .
scripts.build: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:docs && bun run build:electron
scripts.package:desktop: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:electron && bun run forge package
scripts.release:windows: bun run build:renderer && bun run build:electron && bun run forge make --platform=win32 --arch=x64
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:angular && bun run typecheck:electron
scripts.typecheck:angular: ng build electron --configuration development && ng build docs --configuration development --base-href /qdb-downloader/
scripts.test: ng test electron --watch=false && ng test docs --watch=false && vitest run --config tools/vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:coverage: ng test electron --watch=false --coverage && ng test docs --watch=false --coverage && vitest run --coverage --config tools/vitest.config.ts
scripts.validate:source: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck
scripts.validate: bun run validate:source && bun run test
scripts.version: bun run create-version && bun run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md
scripts.release:patch: git checkout master && npm version patch -m "chore(update): patch release %s 🐛"
scripts.release:minor: git checkout master && npm version minor -m "chore(update): release %s 🚀"
scripts.release:major: git checkout master && npm version major -m "chore(update): major release %s 💥"
